title: myosotis decumbens subsp. variabilis
intro: Myosotis decumbens subsp. variabilis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the creeping forget-me-not. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Myosotis decumbens subsp. variabilis include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
